user.title: Email Events HA
user.description: Select the Email HA account to monitor. Optionally restrict to specific sender addresses.

data.sender_filter: Sender filter (comma-separated emails, leave empty for all)

abort.no_email_ha_entries: No Email HA accounts configured. Set up Email HA first.

init.title: Email Events HA options

data.action: What would you like to do?

data_description.sender_filter: Comma-separated sender addresses to process. Leave empty to process all senders. Example: noreply@specsavers.com, booking@clinic.com

add_rule.title: Add sender rule
add_rule.description: Map a sender email address to a specific parsing schema.

data_description.sender: Full sender address as it appears in emails, e.g. noreply@specsavers.com

add_name.title: Add email name mapping
add_name.description: Map an email address to a display name shown in sensor attributes.

data_description.email: Full email address to map, e.g. john@gmail.com
data_description.display_name: Name to show in sensor attributes, e.g. John

error.empty_sender: Sender email address cannot be empty.
